view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement to detect empty slots within 24-48 hours is satisfied as evidenced by the system's behavior.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement to detect empty slots within 24-48 hours is satisfied as evidenced by the system's behavior.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by demonstrating that the system detects an empty slot and initiates a discount offer to fill it. The linked use case describes a scenario where a photographer's empty slot is detected, and a flash sale is sent to past clients, confirming the system's capability to identify and act on empty slots within the specified timeframe. This aligns directly with the requirement of detecting empty slots within 24-48 hours, thus fulfilling the validation criteria.
